import axios from"axios";const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:8000/api"});// Attach JWT token to all requests
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("access_token");if(token){config.headers["Authorization"]="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});// Handle 401 responses - token expiration
